Column 4 already has 1 (R1C4) and 6 (R2C4) and 3 (R5C4) and 2 (R4C4), so col 4 missing 4,5. So 1 can't go in col 4.  
Therefore 1 must go in R6C6 in box 6. That's a hidden single.
